faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Annadale home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants, especially during spring and summer months. You may also notice winged ants near windows, which indicate an established colony nearby.

faqs.question: What does carpenter ant control cost in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Annadale typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of colonies present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Annadale?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Annadale residents. Carpenter ant infestations require prompt attention to prevent structural damage, so we prioritize urgent calls and can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours of your first contact.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will provide you with specific instructions for before and after treatment to ensure your family's safety.
